basic_details.job_title: NISST Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Technical Manager and Faculty Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Secondary Steel Technology (NISST)
basic_details.post_name: Technical Manager and Faculty for Electrician Courses
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Secondary Steel Technology (NISST) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 6 Technical Manager and Faculty for Electrician Courses Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 28-05-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Technical Manager, no specific limit for Faculty.
age_limit.details: Technical Manager (Electrical & Electronics): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD is as per Govt. of India rules. Faculty for Electrician Courses: No specific age limit mentioned.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Electrical/Electronic Engineering for Technical Manager and B.E. in Electrical Engineering for Faculty.
qualification.details: Technical Manager (Electrical / Electronics): Master's Degree in Electrical / Electronic Engineering from an AICTE-approved Institution with a minimum of seven (07) years of experience in a steel plant in the areas of Energy Management, Power Systems, Maintenance and Training. Experience in Government PSU shall be preferred. Faculty for Electrician Courses: B.E. in Electrical Engineering from an AICTE-approved Institution with a minimum of five (05) years of experience in the Steel Industry.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Empanelment of Faculty for Electrician Courses

salary_details.pay_scale: Upto Rs. 1,25,000/- consolidated per month for Technical Manager; Rs. 1,000/- per hour for Faculty.
salary_details.details: Technical Manager (Electrical & Electronics): Upto Rs. 1,25,000/- consolidated per month. Engagement initially for a minimum period of three years (1+2), extendable by a further period of three (3) years based on performance and organizational requirement. Personnel shall remain on probation during the 1st year. Faculty for Electrician Courses: Based on hourly lecture basis @ Rs. 1,000/- per hour.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NISST Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NISST recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NISST Technical Manager and Faculty for Electrician Courses posts is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the NISST recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Technical Manager and Faculty for Electrician Courses positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Technical Manager post, candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Electrical/Electronic Engineering from an AICTE-approved Institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Faculty for Electrician Courses post?
faq.answer: There is no specific age limit mentioned for the Faculty for Electrician Courses position in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Technical Manager position?
faq.answer: The Technical Manager will receive a consolidated salary of up to Rs. 1,25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this NISST recruitment is offline, meaning candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the Faculty for Electrician Courses?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Faculty for Electrician Courses need to have a minimum of five (05) years of experience in the Steel Industry.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NISST located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Secondary Steel Technology (NISST) is located in Mandi Gobindgarh, Punjab, with the pincode 147301.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the contract for the Technical Manager?
faq.answer: The engagement for the Technical Manager is initially for a minimum period of three years (1+2), which can be extended based on performance and organizational requirements.
